/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m0plus  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage -mcpu=cortex-m0plus  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage -Os -g0 -mcpu=cortex-m0plus  -T "/home/amrm/Documents/AM/Bongo-Cat-Fidget-Toy/Software/Bongo-cat-fidget-toy-cmake/STM32G030XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=Bongo-cat-fidget-toy-cmake.map
